note: USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Copy this file to <home>/.maestro/pricing.json to override Maestro's built-in rates (Maestro reads that path when present). Verify against https://www.anthropic.com/pricing before relying on cost figures; edit rates here as they change. Model keys are matched as prefixes, so a family key like 'claude-opus-4' covers version-dated ids such as 'claude-opus-4-20250514'.
